title: Rustic Roasted Australian Beef Burger
description: A nostalgic Australian dish featuring a grassy and fluffy beef burger, served with keto-friendly fries and mortar-pestle-pounded seasonings.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
In a mortar and pestle, pound the Morton Bay salt, black pepper, and dried lemon myrtle into a coarse seasoning.
In a large bowl, combine the minced beef, diced Australian bush tomatoes, and pounded seasoning, and mix well with your hands.
Divide the mixture into 4 equal portions and shape each into a round burger patty.
Place the burger patties on a baking tray lined with parchment paper and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
While the burgers are cooking, heat the macadamia oil in a large saucepan over medium heat and cook the keto fries until crispy.
Once the burgers are cooked, remove them from the oven and let them rest for 5 minutes.
Serve the burgers on a bed of chopped Australian parsley, with the crispy keto fries on the side.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
